title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Air (Crest 1/Dawn Gold) SLBY1B02
description:
The Air Series is the thinnest switch ever launched by LifeSmart. Unlike previous series, it features an AG glass surface. With a faceplate thickness of just 3.7mm and a standard 86×86mm size, it comes in one-, two-, and four-button layouts, perfectly fitting common backboxes.
Adapter: This SKU default does not include actuators. Need to be ordered together with extra actuators. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：86*86mm； Panel Mounting Projection: Projects 3.7 mm from the wall； Mounting Method: The face cover is secured to the flange via snap-fit clips; the flange is fixed to an 86-type back box.； Wired CoTP: CoTP 3-pin interface * 1； Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
